info.prompt:
anime art of a teen Indian girl standing on a sun-baked patch of rocky earth, the jagged peaks of the Himalayas rising behind her like a crumpled parchment. Her light brown skin glows under the golden afternoon light, strands of chestnut hair escaping from her loose braid as she lifts a hand to tuck them back, fingers brushing the delicate silver hoop in her earlobe. The bright pink fabric of her ankle-length dress—printed with tiny white jasmine blossoms—ripples in the mountain breeze, the fitted bodice and woven belt emphasizing her slender frame. Dust clings to the hem of her skirt, evidence of the long walk up the hillside, and her bare feet are planted firmly in the dirt, toes curling around a gnarled root. A single, determined sprig of wild mint pushes through the cracked earth near her left foot, mirroring the quiet resilience in her dark eyes as she gazes past the camera, toward something—or someone—just out of frame., world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
